message:
feat(agent): implement full pt agent plan command (azrg)

Replace stub with complete implementation that:
- Scans all processes via quick_scan
- Computes posterior probabilities for each process
- Makes optimal action decisions via decide_action
- Filters candidates by threshold (--threshold) and type (--only)
- Outputs complete JSON plan with all required fields:
  - candidates[], summary, recommended.preselected_pids
  - Per-candidate: posterior, confidence, blast_radius,
    reversibility, supervisor, uncertainty, expected_loss
- Returns ExitCode::PlanReady (1) when candidates exist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
